description: Extract build_query utility introduces SQL injection via f-string
diff_summary: Extracted query builder utility that uses f-strings to construct SQL from user inputs

edge_cases: Direct SQL injection via name/category/max_price — build_query interpolates values directly into SQL string; name="'; DROP TABLE products;--" works
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Original used parameterized queries (correct); replacement uses string interpolation (SQL injection vulnerability); ILIKE search (partial match) replaced with = (exact match) — search now broken
ground_truth.next_prompt: Product search is only finding exact name matches instead of partial matches
ground_truth.notes: Introduced SQL injection while refactoring — parameterized queries replaced with string interpolation
